mapper.sql: id, name, type, start_time, end_time, break_start_time, break_end_time, late_tolerance_minutes, early_leave_tolerance_minutes, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE shifts SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, break_start_time = #{breakStartTime}, break_end_time = #{breakEndTime}, late_tolerance_minutes = #{lateToleranceMinutes}, early_leave_tolerance_minutes = #{earlyLeaveToleranceMinutes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
